blended.narrative: Sun Peaks is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 2,579 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 3.9" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 5" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
